sections.notificationsDesc: Configure webhook notifications for build events. Supports Telegram Bot, WeChat Work, DingTalk, and generic webhooks.

siteName.label: Site Name
siteName.desc: Display name for this RPM Manager instance

repoBaseUrl.label: Repository Base URL
repoBaseUrl.desc: Base URL used in .repo file generation

githubToken.label: GitHub Token
githubToken.desc: Token for GitHub API (version monitoring, release downloads)

maxConcurrentBuilds.label: Max Concurrent Builds
maxConcurrentBuilds.desc: Maximum number of builds running at the same time

buildTimeout.label: Build Timeout (seconds)
buildTimeout.desc: Maximum time allowed for a single build

rollbackKeepCount.label: Rollback Keep Count
rollbackKeepCount.desc: Number of rollback snapshots to keep (default: 3)

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.desc: URL for build notifications (supports Telegram Bot, WeChat Work, DingTalk, or generic webhook)

notificationEvents.label: Notification Events
notificationEvents.desc: Comma-separated events to notify on (default: build.success,build.failed)
